meta.purpose: Scenario signals for knowledge management judgment.
meta.load_condition: Load when user input contains signals about note-taking systems, PKM evaluation, or knowledge base review.

scenes.name: User asks agent to evaluate their note collection
scenes.trigger_signal: User says 'I have X notes', 'review my knowledge base', 'is my PKM system good', or asks agent to read/analyze their saved notes.

sub_scenarios.trap_belief: A large collection of notes means the user has built valuable knowledge.

three_questions.belief: Can the user articulate the core proposition of any single note?
three_questions.state: Check: for a sample of notes, how many have a proposition, boundary, counter-example, and evolution record?
three_questions.need: Honest classification: what percentage is knowledge assets vs raw material?

action_template: For each, check: proposition, boundary, counter-example, evolution record.
Report the ratio: X% raw material, Y% knowledge assets.
Explain what each raw material note needs to become a knowledge asset.

replace.avoid: Praising note count or tag organization
replace.use: Reporting the knowledge asset ratio with specific examples

replace.avoid: Suggesting more capture tools or better tagging
replace.use: Recommending the user process one note into a knowledge asset before capturing more

sub_scenarios.expected_result: User stops collecting and starts processing. They see the gap between saved notes and usable knowledge.
